title: Juicy Braised Chicken & Cheese Crisp Quesadillas
summary: Crispy, cheesy quesadillas stuffed with leftover pulled chicken from our Braised Turmeric Chicken batch. Dunk 'em in that golden dipping sauce for the ultimate bite.

method.description: Finely slice the red onion and to a bowl with a pinch of salt and the juice of half the limes. Scrunch with your hands and set aside to lightly pickle. Pick the coriander leaves and discard the stems.

Warm the turmeric chicken in a saucepan over a low heat until hot. Spoon out some of the golden broth and set it aside in a small bowl, this is your dipping sauce. 
Use two forks to shred the chicken in the pan, then take off the heat.

Set a large non-stick frying pan over a medium heat. Sprinkle a small handful of cheddar directly into the dry pan, roughly in a tortilla-sized circle. Once it starts to melt and bubble, press a tortilla on top. Leave for 30 seconds, then flip and toast the other side until golden and pliable. Repeat with the remaining cheese and tortillas.

Spread a dollop of soured cream over the cheese side of each tortilla. Fill with shredded chicken, then top with the pickled onion and coriander leaves. Fold in half and serve with the warm dipping broth on the side.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
